Analyze Your Deals

Upload offering memorandums, rent rolls, financials, or property photos. We extract metrics, identify risks, and generate actionable insights in seconds.

Upload Document

Drag & drop files

or click to browse. Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, CSV, JPG, PNG

Max file size: 50MB

The Workflow

1

Upload

Drop your documents. PDFs, spreadsheets, images all supported.

2

Analyze

AI extracts metrics, identifies red flags, scores the deal.

3

Decide

Review analysis, ask questions, make data-driven decisions.

Ready to analyze your first deal?

Upload an offering memorandum and get instant insights. No credit card required.

AI-powered due diligence for real estate professionals
